title: Digimon Adventure tri. Part 4: Loss
original_title: デジモンアドベンチャー tri. 第4章「喪失」
overview: Upon arriving at the Digital World after the "reboot", the Digidestined are hunted by a new villain. Meanwhile, Sora is troubled by her partner Digimon's indifference towards her.
